# Copilot Instruction File

This file provides instructions for GitHub Copilot to follow with every command or instruction in this project.

---

## Tech Stack & Libraries

- **Framework:** Next.js (React)
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS, tailwindcss-animate, autoprefixer
- **UI:** Shadcn, Radix UI, Lucide Icons
- **Animation:** Framer Motion
- **Utilities:** clsx, tailwind-merge
- **Email:** Nodemailer
- **Linting:** ESLint, eslint-config-next
- **Font:** Google Fonts (Inter)

## Instructions to Make Portfolio Outstanding

1. **Design & UX:**
   - Use modern, clean layouts and consistent spacing.
   - Leverage Tailwind CSS for responsive and visually appealing design.
   - always make responsive design a priority, ensuring the portfolio looks great on all devices.
   - make UI design as portfolio worthy as possible, showcasing creativity and attention to detail.
   - Add subtle animations with Framer Motion for smooth transitions.
   - Use dark mode for accessibility and style.
2. **Content:**
   - Clearly showcase your skills, projects, and achievements.
   - Write concise, engaging descriptions for each project.
   - Include a professional About Me section and contact form.
